title: P2: Inconsistent rxMode access in DispatchMessage for continuous RX
description: RX_PACKET always sets rxMode=false even for continuous mode (timeout=0xFFFFFF). This breaks multiple-packet RX in continuous mode. The one-shot RX contract needs rxOneShot flag to only clear rxMode on packet for one-shot SetRx/PollRx (r7h4.6). Add rxOneShot bool, set in SendRxEnter based on timeout, condition the rxMode=false in DispatchMessage and RX_TIMEOUT. Document contract in comments. Use stateLock consistently. Tagged codereview.
close_reason: Fixed inconsistent rxMode (and rxOneShot) clear in DispatchMessage RX_PACKET for one-shot vs continuous RX (now sets both flags under stateLock). Updated comments. Performed 3 clean codereview passes with all P4 findings (ysvm,r9fq) filed+fixed as real work. No remaining issues in rx path. Consistent with r7h4.6 contract.
